name: Breath Out
description: Final exhale releasing all remaining tension

simple: final exhale releasing all remaining tension into stillness
standard: final exhale releasing all remaining tension into stillness
soft breath out settling body and mind to rest
last air leaving with warmth and gentle whisper
detailed: final exhale releasing all remaining tension into stillness
soft breath out settling body and mind to rest
last air leaving with warmth and gentle whisper
diaphragm relaxing as lungs empty completely
silence rushing in to fill the space left by breath

instruments: pure sine tone at concert pitch
porcelain bowl struck with felt tip
